spotlight.title: This Month: Meenari
spotlight.intro: Once a month, we honor one member whose effort, enthusiasm & spirit help the guild move together.
body: This month we lift a lantern for Meenari & the spark they bring to the guild.
They answer questions, welcome new members & help others feel at home.
In busy hours, that presence matters: one kind reply can turn a new name into someone remembered.
spotlight.conclusion: Thank you so much for the patience & pretty acts that keep Mōchirīī moving forward together.
